sections.paragraph:
Original: יצג

Transliteration: yâtsag

Phonetic: yaw-tsag'

BDB Definition:

  1. to place, set, establish
    1. (Hiphil)
      1. to set, place
      2. to present
      3. to exhibit
    2. (Hophal) to be stopped, be stayed, be detained

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 895

Part(s) of speech: Verb
